purpose: Scout the next downstream bottleneck after closing hand-tuned symbol policy work at P0-88.

oracle_fusion_v2.interpretation: When oracle nodes are available, node quality is saturated; remaining gap is relation inference, specifically contains relations.

registered_expert_svg_candidate_smoke.interpretation: With registered expert checkpoints on SVG-derived candidates, text is saturated, space is acceptable, boundary is a material non-symbol weakness, and symbol remains weak but is now bounded by P0-88 policy handoff rather than more hand-tuned gates.

symbol_policy_p085.interpretation: P0-76 opt-in is packaged and graph-safe; further hand-tuned symbol iteration is not the next best bottleneck scout target.

ranked_next_bottlenecks.evidence: oracle fusion_v2 has perfect node F1 but relation recall 0.866534 with 335 missing contains edges and 52 extra contains edges.
ranked_next_bottlenecks.recommended_next_task: P0-90 audit contains relation misses/extras by room/symbol geometry and propose a calibrated relation scorer or containment policy.

ranked_next_bottlenecks.evidence: registered expert smoke boundary node F1 is 0.774974, below space 0.886297 and text 0.994737.
ranked_next_bottlenecks.recommended_next_task: Audit boundary false labels/misses before retraining; determine if issue is candidate coverage, label classifier, or graph topology.

ranked_next_bottlenecks.evidence: registered expert smoke space node F1 is 0.886297; not saturated but less urgent than relation contains and boundary.
ranked_next_bottlenecks.recommended_next_task: Inspect room boundary/contains relation errors first because space quality may interact with contains relation inference.

ranked_next_bottlenecks.evidence: registered expert smoke text node F1 is 0.994737.
ranked_next_bottlenecks.recommended_next_task: Do not prioritize text unless a downstream metric specifically surfaces text relation failures.

decision.why: Relation contains inference is the clearest non-symbol downstream bottleneck: nodes are oracle-perfect in fusion_v2 but relation recall still misses 335 contains edges.
avoid: Do not add new symbol detector gates.
Do not train a model before a relation miss/extra audit identifies features and failure modes.
